site.title: Shubham Pandey
site.description: Machine Learning Engineer at Meta with 8+ years of experience in production ML systems

header.tagline: Machine Learning Engineer @ Meta | Building Production AI Systems

about.summary: I build end-to-end AI systems that work in production, not just in notebooks.
paragraphs: With 8+ years of experience in machine learning and data engineering, I specialize in NLP, Large Language Models (LLMs), MLOps, and building scalable AI pipelines.

Currently working as a Machine Learning Engineer at Meta, contributing to next-generation AI products. Previously led ML initiatives at Delaware North, built AI solutions at Tredence and Wipro, and completed my Master's in Artificial Intelligence from University at Buffalo.
I'm passionate about bridging the gap between research and real-world AI deployment, with a focus on building systems that are reliable, scalable, and make real impact.

description: Working on production ML systems for Meta's AI products
Building and optimizing ML pipelines at scale
Contributing to next-generation AI products and features
Led development of ML Observability platform for model monitoring
Built real-time data pipelines processing 50TB+ data daily
Implemented NLP solutions for enterprise analytics
Reduced inference latency by 40% through optimization
Built ETL pipelines for enterprise data warehouse
Developed automated data quality monitoring systems
Collaborated with ML team on feature engineering
Developed predictive models for financial analytics
Built dashboards for investment insights
Led NLP projects for Fortune 500 clients
Built voice of customer analytics platforms
Developed ML models for retail analytics
Developed AI solutions for client engagements
Built NLP pipelines for text analytics
Implemented chatbot systems for enterprises
Built ML models for client projects
Developed automation solutions
Worked on natural language processing projects
